title: From Conversation to Contribution: Characterizing Coding Agent in Open-Source Software
summary: From Conversation to Contribution: Characterizing Coding Agent in Open-Source Software
whyItMatters: AI coding assistants such as GitHub Copilot and Cursor have evolved from code-suggestion tools into conversational collaborators, enabling vibe-coding workflows in which developers guide AI-generated code through natural-language dialogue. Although researchers have increasingly recognized the importance of AI coding agents and begun examining their impact o…
